marketplace.name: Leaf Memory
marketplace.description: Match pairs of tropical leaves before the timer runs out.

headerBest.name: Best score label
headerBest.description: Header label preceding the session-best score.

headerLevel.name: Level label
headerLevel.description: Header label preceding the current level indicator.

headerTime.name: Time label
headerTime.description: Header label preceding the remaining seconds.

bestEmpty.name: Best score placeholder
bestEmpty.description: Shown in place of the score when the player has not passed any round yet.

levelDisplay.name: Level value template
levelDisplay.description: Current level vs. total levels. Keep both placeholders.

timeDisplay.name: Time value template
timeDisplay.description: Remaining time with a units suffix (e.g. seconds).

announceRoundStarted.name: Announcer: round started
announceRoundStarted.description: Live-region screen-reader message when the round begins (after peek phase ends).

announceMemorize.name: Announcer: memorize
announceMemorize.description: Live-region screen-reader message during the peek phase while cards are revealed.

announceOutOfTime.name: Announcer: out of time
announceOutOfTime.description: Live-region screen-reader message when the round timer hits zero.

announceRoundPassed.name: Announcer: round passed
announceRoundPassed.description: Live-region screen-reader message when all pairs are matched.

announceMatch.name: Announcer: match
announceMatch.description: Live-region screen-reader message when the player flips a matching pair.

announceNoMatch.name: Announcer: no match
announceNoMatch.description: Live-region screen-reader message when the player flips a mismatched pair.

ariaCard.name: Card aria-label
ariaCard.description: Screen-reader label for each tile. Index is 1-based.

ariaBoard.name: Board aria-label
ariaBoard.description: Screen-reader label for the grid of cards.

startTitle.name: Start screen title
startTitle.description: Headline shown on the start screen before the player begins level 1.

startBody.name: Start screen body
startBody.description: Instructions shown on the start screen.

startButton.name: Start button
startButton.description: Label for the button that begins level 1.

winTitleLevel1.name: Win title (level 1)
winTitleLevel1.description: Headline shown after the player passes level 1.

winTitleLevel2.name: Win title (level 2)
winTitleLevel2.description: Headline shown after the player passes level 2.

winTitleLevel3.name: Win title (level 3)
winTitleLevel3.description: Headline shown after the player passes level 3.

winTitleLevel4.name: Win title (final level)
winTitleLevel4.description: Headline shown after the player passes the final level. Tone is intentionally celebratory and bot-aware.

winBodyNewBest.name: Win body (new best)
winBodyNewBest.description: Body shown when the round score beats the previous session best.

winBodyScore.name: Win body (regular)
winBodyScore.description: Body shown after a passed round when the score did not beat the previous best.

winRetry.name: Retry button (win screen)
winRetry.description: Label for the button that restarts the same level after passing it.

winLevelUpDefault.name: Level-up button (default)
winLevelUpDefault.description: Fallback label for the advance-level button when no per-level label is defined.

winLevelUpAfter1.name: Level-up button (after level 1)
winLevelUpAfter1.description: Label for the button that advances from level 1 to level 2.

winLevelUpAfter2.name: Level-up button (after level 2)
winLevelUpAfter2.description: Label for the button that advances from level 2 to level 3.

winLevelUpAfter3.name: Level-up button (after level 3)
winLevelUpAfter3.description: Label for the button that advances from level 3 to level 4 (the final level).

lossTitle.name: Loss screen title
lossTitle.description: Headline shown on the loss screen when the timer expires.

lossBody.name: Loss screen body
lossBody.description: Body text shown on the loss screen.

lossRetry.name: Retry button (loss screen)
lossRetry.description: Label for the button that restarts the failed level.

lossEasier.name: Try easier button
lossEasier.description: Label for the button that drops one level down. Hidden at level 1.

English.startBody: Flip two cards at a time to find matching leaves. Clear the board before time runs out.
English.winTitleLevel4: No bot can ever be that good!
English.lossBody: The board did not clear before the buzzer.

Arabic.startBody: اقلب بطاقتين في كل مرة للعثور على أوراق متطابقة. أكمل اللوحة قبل انتهاء الوقت.
Arabic.winTitleLevel4: لا يمكن لأي روبوت أن يكون بهذه البراعة!
Arabic.lossBody: لم تكتمل اللوحة قبل انتهاء المؤقت.

bg.name: Stage background
bg.description: Root iframe background; full-bleed under the header, board, and actions.

text.name: Primary text
text.description: Header values, screen body text, neutral copy.

label.name: Header labels
label.description: The Best / Level / Time chip labels (deemphasized).

title.name: Screen title
title.description: Headline color on the start / win / loss screens.

card_back_text.name: Card back text
card_back_text.description: Color of the question mark on a face-down card.

card_front_bg.name: Card front background
card_front_bg.description: Background of a face-up card behind the leaf.

card_front_text.name: Card front leaf color
card_front_text.description: currentColor for the leaf SVG. Decides the leaf tint.

card_match_accent.name: Match accent
card_match_accent.description: Border + pulse color around a freshly matched pair.

button_bg.name: Primary button bg
button_bg.description: Background of the Start / Retry primary button.

button_hover.name: Primary button hover bg
button_hover.description: Hover state of the primary button.

button_secondary_text.name: Secondary button text
button_secondary_text.description: Text + border color of the secondary button (Try easier / Level up).

button_secondary_border.name: Secondary button border
button_secondary_border.description: Outline color of the secondary button.

button_secondary_hover_bg.name: Secondary button hover bg
button_secondary_hover_bg.description: Hover background of the secondary button.

focus_ring.name: Focus ring
focus_ring.description: Outline color shown on cards / buttons when keyboard focus enters.

leaf_fern.name: Fern leaf
leaf_fern.description: Card art for the fern pair. currentColor inside the SVG drives the tint, which comes from card_front_text.

leaf_monstera_a.name: Monstera A
leaf_monstera_a.description: Card art for the first monstera variant.

leaf_monstera_b.name: Monstera B
leaf_monstera_b.description: Card art for the second monstera variant.

leaf_monstera_c.name: Monstera C
leaf_monstera_c.description: Card art for the third monstera variant.

leaf_banana_hand.name: Banana hand
leaf_banana_hand.description: Card art for the banana-hand pair.

leaf_heart.name: Heart leaf
leaf_heart.description: Card art for the heart-shaped pair.

start_level.name: Starting level
start_level.description: Which level (1-4) the round starts on. Subsequent rounds advance / retreat per the in-game buttons.

show_high_score.name: Show best score
show_high_score.description: Display the Best chip in the header.

show_level_indicator.name: Show level indicator
show_level_indicator.description: Display the Level chip in the header.

mismatch_flip_back_ms.name: Mismatch flip-back delay (ms)
mismatch_flip_back_ms.description: Milliseconds a mismatched pair stays revealed before flipping back face-down.

memorize_seconds_level_1.name: Memorize time, level 1
memorize_seconds_level_1.description: Seconds the cards stay revealed before the round timer starts on level 1.

solve_seconds_level_1.name: Solve time, level 1
solve_seconds_level_1.description: Total seconds the player has to clear level 1 once the timer starts.

memorize_seconds_level_2.name: Memorize time, level 2
memorize_seconds_level_2.description: Seconds the cards stay revealed before the round timer starts on level 2.

solve_seconds_level_2.name: Solve time, level 2
solve_seconds_level_2.description: Total seconds the player has to clear level 2 once the timer starts.

memorize_seconds_level_3.name: Memorize time, level 3
memorize_seconds_level_3.description: Seconds the cards stay revealed before the round timer starts on level 3.

solve_seconds_level_3.name: Solve time, level 3
solve_seconds_level_3.description: Total seconds the player has to clear level 3 once the timer starts.

memorize_seconds_level_4.name: Memorize time, level 4
memorize_seconds_level_4.description: Seconds the cards stay revealed before the round timer starts on level 4.

solve_seconds_level_4.name: Solve time, level 4
solve_seconds_level_4.description: Total seconds the player has to clear level 4 once the timer starts.
